news.t: Tradr Launches First Mover Leveraged ETFs on CLSK, CRDO, ENPH, GS and U

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long JOBY Daily ETF (JOBX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of Joby Aviation stock (NASDAQ: JOBY). Joby Aviation is a venture-backed aviation company that develops an all-electric, vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) air taxi. JOBX was launched on Sep 8, 2025 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Launches First Mover Leveraged ETFs on CLSK, CRDO, ENPH, GS and U
data.text: Single-stock funds seek to provide 200% long exposure on a variety of industry leaders NEW YORK , Sept. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and...
